india_trends.title: Mehul Telecom IPO allotment to be finalised today. Latest GMP, step-by-step guide to check status
india_trends.summary: Mehul Telecom IPO allotment will be finalized today, April 22. Investors can check their allotment status on Kfin Technologies Ltd's portal. The IPO subscription was 44.91 times, and refunds for non-allocation start April 23, with shares credited the same day. Mehul Telecom IPO GMP is +3.

india_trends.title: Tech Mahindra declares Rs 36/share final dividend; sets July 3 as record date
india_trends.summary: Tech Mahindra Dividend announcement: The company has set July 3 as the record date to determine shareholders' eligibility to receive the dividend.

india_trends.title: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 16% YoY to Rs 1,354 crore; revenue up 13%
india_trends.summary: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: The company’s board has also approved a final dividend of Rs 36 per share for the financial year ended March 2026.

india_trends.title: India likely to breach budgeted fiscal deficit target for FY27: BMI
india_trends.summary: India's fiscal deficit may exceed its target, reaching 4.5 percent of GDP. This is due to government policies responding to the West Asia conflict. Measures include supporting key industries and firms. The government might restrict exports of crucial inputs like helium and sulphur. Energy and fertil

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹100 hits 10% upper circuit after Vijay Kedia buys 1% stake in Q4
india_trends.summary: Websol Energy shares surged 10% following Vijay Kedia's acquisition of a 1.02% stake. Despite recent gains, the stock has fallen over 35% in a year. The company will hold a board meeting on April 27 to discuss Q4 results and a potential dividend, its first in 17 years.

india_trends.title: Ruchit Jain of Motilal Oswal suggests Balrampur Chini, Paras Defence, DMart shares to buy in the near-term
india_trends.summary: Indian benchmark indices faced selling pressure on April 22, with the Sensex dropping over 800 points and Nifty 50 falling more than 200 points. Despite this, the broader market showed strength. Analysts recommend buying Balrampur Chini, Paras Defence, and DMart for potential short-term gains.

india_trends.title: L&T Energy GreenTech, Japan's ITOCHU ink long-term green ammonia supply deal
india_trends.summary: Indian firm Larsen and Toubro's green energy arm has secured a major deal. It will supply 300,000 tonnes of green ammonia annually to Japanese trading company ITOCHU Corp. india_trends.title: Luxury in India is no longer defined by Delhi, Mumbai or Bengaluru
india_trends.summary: India's luxury market is expanding beyond traditional metro hubs as wealth and consumer exposure grow. india_trends.summary: Paisalo Digital says it is moving to embed artificial intelligence across its entire credit lifecycle — from customer acquisition and onboarding to underwriting, collections and portfolio monitoring

india_trends.title: UK inflation rises to 3.3% as Iran war impact begins to hit
india_trends.summary: UK inflation rose to 3.3% in March from 3.0% in February, driven by higher fuel prices amid Middle East tensions. The increase, slightly above expectations, has prompted forecasts of further inflation pressure, though the Bank of England is still expected to hold interest rates steady in the near te

india_trends.title: Rs 92,000 crore ripple effect! HCL Tech’s weak Q4 drags IT pack; Infosys, Tech Mahindra slump up to 6%
india_trends.summary: HCL Technologies’s weak Q4 triggered a ₹92,000 crore sell-off in IT stocks, dragging peers like Infosys and Tech Mahindra down up to 6% amid sector-wide concerns.

india_trends.title: USFDA issues Form-483 with 5 observations to Ajanta Pharma's Paithan facility
india_trends.summary: Ajanta Pharma said the US FDA has issued Form-483 with five observations after inspecting its Paithan manufacturing facility in Maharashtra from April 13–21, 2026. The company stated it will respond within the stipulated timeframe, while noting that Form-483 is issued when inspectors observe potenti

india_trends.title: FPI Exodus: Financial sector sees over ₹19,000 crore outflows in April; IT, FMCG, Auto also hit
india_trends.summary: FPIs have sold Indian equities worth ₹48,141 crore in early April 2026, with financial services hit hardest. The ongoing West Asian conflict influences global equity markets, creating volatility in FPI flows, while select sectors like power experience slight inflows amidst broader downturns.

india_trends.title: Crude oil prices remain unchanged after 9% gains in last two sessions. What's the near-term outlook?
india_trends.summary: Oil prices were mostly unchanged on Wednesday, after an initial rise of around $1 in early Asian trading. Here's what experts say on oil prices' near-term outlook.

india_trends.title: Vedanta Demerger Explained: From listing timeline, price discovery to passive flows - all you need to know
india_trends.summary: Vedanta demerger record date is May 1, 2026. The company’s board of directors have fixed May 1 as the demerger effective date and the demerger record date for determining the shareholders eligible to receive shares in the newly carved-out businesses.
